creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
- garbage collect non-font files (also fixes plist on 10.0)
- remove CHOWN line, prefer INSTALL_DATA
- move fonts from DATADIR/fonts to DATADIR

How-To-Repeat: http://pointyhat.freebsd.org/errorlogs/i386-errorlogs/e.10.20111207031942/ja-font-mplus-ipa-1.0.20060520.p1_1.log
